rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/16/16. A filed stamped courtesy paper copy of all electronically filed documents requiring Court review or action needed to have been delivered not later than 1:30 p.m. of the day following electronic filing [Local Rule 2.11T]. Filed stamped copies must be delivered wto Room 202 no later than 3 days prior to continued hearing date, along with a proposed order.
